summary: Frontend testing of Go Live Pricing Modal and Request a Pro Auto-Trigger features. Fixed critical nested useEffect bug in MapPage.js. Both features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: MapPage.js lines 144-162 had nested useEffect hooks (useEffect inside another useEffect) causing 'Invalid hook call' React error. Fixed by moving inner useEffect outside.
UnifiedSpotDrawer.js: Pricing modal correctly shows all 4 fields (Buy-in Price, Max Surfers, Estimated Duration, Auto-Accept toggle)
MapPage.js lines 1182-1212: Request a Pro button correctly handles location flow with pendingRequestPro flag
MapPage.js lines 154-162: Auto-trigger useEffect correctly opens modal when pendingRequestPro && userLocation are both truthy
MapPage.js lines 518-570: getUserLocation correctly sets locationDenied and clears pendingRequestPro on error
MapPage.js lines 1162-1179: Location denied warning banner with Help button implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Created hobbyist_photo@surf.com photographer user for testing Go Live flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new features verified working: (1) Go Live pricing modal shows all fields (Buy-in Price $25, Max Surfers 10, Duration 2h, Auto-Accept toggle), (2) Request a Pro shows location denied warning with Help button when location permission denied. The auto-trigger flow (pendingRequestPro + useEffect) is correctly implemented but could not fully test loading spinner due to browser automation lacking geolocation.

go_live_pricing_modal.description: Clicking 'Start Shooting' on surf spot drawer opens pricing modal with Buy-in Price, Max Surfers, Estimated Duration, and Auto-Accept toggle fields

request_pro_auto_trigger.description: Clicking Request a Pro when location NULL triggers getUserLocation, shows loading state, and auto-opens modal when location resolves. Location denied shows warning banner with Help button.

role_based_visibility.description: Start Shooting button only visible for photographer roles (Hobbyist), not visible for Pro Surfer (Kelly)

location_denied_warning.description: Location denied banner shows with red warning icon and Help button that provides browser settings guidance

bug_fixed.issue: Nested useEffect hook inside another useEffect causing 'Invalid hook call' React error
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved inner useEffect (pendingRequestPro auto-trigger) outside the outer useEffect
bug_fixed.severity: CRITICAL - Map page was completely broken
